---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a skill, registry file, CLI command, or generated site
title: "Bug: "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Affected Area

Which skill, collection, site adapter, command, workflow, or document is
affected?

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead?

## Reproduction

List the smallest public, non-sensitive steps that reproduce the issue.

## Environment

- Operating system:
- Python version:
- Scheduler or runtime, if relevant:
- Command used, if relevant:

## Safety And Privacy Check

- [ ] No usernames, tokens, allocation names, private hostnames, or internal
      project identifiers are included.
- [ ] No unpublished cluster policy or security procedure is included.
